source.body_text_sample:
We value your privacy

(EN) We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalised ads or content, and analyse our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.

(FR) Nous utilisons des cookies pour optimiser votre expérience de navigation, proposer des publicités ou contenus personnalisés et analyser le trafic sur notre site. En cliquant sur « Tout accepter », vous consentez à l’utilisation de l’ensemble des cookies.

 

Customise/Personnaliser
Reject All/Tout Refuser
Accept All/Tout Accepter
Amplify your career.
Join Float4.
Working at Float4

If you are looking to do the best work of your career, collaborating with an industry-leading team of creatives and technologists on bold high-visibility international projects, you’ve come to the right place.

Beyond the impactful work itself, employees enjoy a creative environment and open atmosphere along with a solid benefits package.

From comprehensive health, dental, wellness and travel insurance, employer matched retirement savings account, and generous time-off benefits to various (and rather clever!) team retreats, activities and celebrations.

Opportunities at Float4

Back-End / Full-Stack Developer (Hybrid)

Montreal, QC
